case_title: THE TIDES CETER, A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT PUBLIC VS. CHRISTOPHER COX ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IN SUPPORT OF OPPOSITION ON STAY OF EVICTION (TRANSACTION ID # 67699807) FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE TIDES CETER, A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT PUBLIC BENEFIT CORPORATION
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 67650441) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5
